node.text: Audrey is looking forward to ordering sushi for tonight.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "likes eating food") on Observation 4 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Audrey loves sushi and advises trying different types and flavors without limiting oneself.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "likes eating food") on Observation 2 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Audrey suggests trying California or salmon roll as easier options for someone new to sushi, and mixing it up with different sauces and dips.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "likes eating food") on Observation 3 (Score: 0.97)

node.text: Audrey enjoys making pastries and mentioned having a pastry party.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "likes eating food") on Observation 4 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Audrey made goodies recently to thank her neighbors for their pup-friendly homes.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "likes eating food") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.94)

node.text: Pepper, Pixie, Precious, and Panda are the names of Audrey's dogs, each having their own favorite spot to relax.
Audrey has four dogs as pets and finds them to be enough for now to give them proper attention.
Audrey has multiple dogs that she refers to as her 'fur kids'.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "likes eating food") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.56)

node.text: Audrey had an accident while playing with her pups at the park, making it tricky to take care of them with one arm.
